2026-03-13T07:18:44.7707729Z The bug is in the mgmt generator's response deserialization template — it needs a type check to emit `result.Content` when the return type is `BinaryData` rather than `BinaryData.FromResponse(result)`.

Exceeding these limits will result in an immediate error with specific guidance. NOTE: By default, this tool requires discussions:write permission. Use the endCursor from the previous page's PageInfo for GraphQL APIs.","type":"string"},"direction":{"description":"Order direction. If provided, the 'orderBy' also needs to be provided.","enum":["ASC","DESC"],"type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Filter by labels","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"orderBy":{"description":"Order issues by field. If provided, the 'direction' also needs to be provided.","enum":["CREATED_AT","UPDATED_AT","COMMENTS"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Repository owner","type":"string"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"repo":{"description":"Repository name","type":"string"},"since":{"description":"Filter by date (ISO 8601 timestamp)","type":"string"},"state":{"description":"Filter by state, by default both open and closed issues are returned when not provided","enum":["OPEN","CLOSED"],"type":"string"}},"required":["owner","repo"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_issues","icons":[{"src":"data:image/png;base64,","mimeType":"image/png","theme":"light"},{"src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABgAAAAYCAYAAADgdz34AAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAABxElEQVRIibWVvW4TURCFv0vlNEDcIHAkKAERJOIK...

2026-03-13T07:19:01.4710821Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T07:17:22.257880613Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57055,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator Bug] Generated code calls BinaryData.FromResponse which does not exist\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nThe generator emits `BinaryData.FromResponse(result)` in resource operation methods, but `BinaryData` does not have a static `FromResponse` method. This causes CS0117 build errors.\\n\\n## Impact\\n\\n**4 files** affected in SecurityInsights migration (#56944).\\n\\n## How to Reproduce\\n\\n1. Clone `azure-sdk-for-net` and `azure-rest-api-specs`\\n2. Checkout branch `securityinsights-typespec-migration` in azure-sdk-for-net\\n3. Checkout branch `securityinsights-csharp-migration` in azure-rest-api-specs\\n4. Run code generation:\\n```bash\\ncd sdk/securityinsights/Azure.ResourceManager.SecurityInsights/src\\ndotnet build /t:GenerateCode /p:LocalSpecRepo=/specification/securityinsights/resource-manager/Microsoft.SecurityInsights/SecurityInsights\\n```\\n5. Build: `dotnet build`\\n6. Observe CS0117 errors: `BinaryData does not contain a definition for FromResponse`\\n\\n## Root Cause\\n\\nThe generator treats `BinaryData` like a generated model type and emits a model-style `FromResponse` helper call. But `BinaryData` is a framework type that does not have this static method.\\n\\n**Example:** `SecurityInsightsAutomationRuleResource.cs` (line 226):\\n```csharp\\nResponse result = await Pipeline.ProcessMessageAsync(message, context).ConfigureAwait(false);\\nResponse response = Response.FromValue(BinaryData.FromResponse(result), result);  // BUG\\n```\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nShould use `result.Content` instead:\\n```csharp\\nResponse response = Response.FromValue(result.Content, result);\\n```\\n\\n## Affected Files\\n\\n- `SecurityInsightsAutomationRuleResource.cs` (lines 226, 278)\\n- `SecurityInsightsIncidentResource.cs` (lines 617, 666)\\n\\nThese are resource types whose operations return `BinaryData` (e.g., delete operations with response bodies).\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57055\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"live1206\",\"id\":5196139,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/live1206\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5196139?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"CodeGen\",\"SecurityInsights\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-13T07:14:57Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-13T07:16:25Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-03-13T07:19:01.4833138Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-13T07:18:39.161787328Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"safeoutputs","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"body":"## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage\n\n**Summary:** The Azure Management Plane Generator (`http-client-csharp-mgmt`) incorrectly emits `BinaryData.FromResponse(result)` for operations returning `BinaryData`, but `BinaryData` is a .NET framework type with no such static method. The correct pattern is `result.Content`. This causes `CS0117` build errors in the SecurityInsights migration.\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e📋 Issue Details\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n| Field | Value |\n|---|---|\n| **Type** | Bug (generator regression) |\n| **Severity** | Blocks the SecurityInsights TypeSpec migration PR #56944 |\n| **Affected Files** | `SecurityInsightsAutomationRuleResource.cs` (lines 226, 278), `SecurityInsightsIncidentResource.cs` (lines 617, 666) |\n| **Root Cause** | Generator treats `BinaryData` like a generated model type and emits `FromResponse()` instead of `.Content` |\n| **Scope** | Likely affects all resource operations returning `BinaryData` (e.g., delete-with-body), not just SecurityInsights |\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🔍 Root Cause Analysis\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThe generator emits:\n```csharp\nResponse\u003cBinaryData\u003e response = Response.FromValue(BinaryData.FromResponse(result), result);\n```\n\nBut `BinaryData` is `System.BinaryData` — a framework type. It does NOT have a `FromResponse(Response)` static method. This pattern is auto-generated for SDK model types (which do have `FromResponse`), but is incorrectly applied when the return type is `BinaryData` itself.\n\nThe fix should be in the generator template/visitor logic that emits response deserialization, specifically the code path that handles `BinaryData` as a return type. The correct output is:\n```csharp\nResponse\u003cBinaryData\u003e response = Response.FromValue(result.Content, result);\n```\n\nThe relevant generator code is likely in `/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/` — in the visitor/template that generates resource operation return value handling.\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🛠️ Debugging Strategy\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n1. **Locate the code generation template** — Search for `FromResponse` in `/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/` to find where this pattern is emitted.\n2. **Check type discrimination logic** — There should be a check for whether the response type is `BinaryData` (framework type) vs. a generated model type. The model type path emits `.FromResponse(result)`, but the `BinaryData` path should emit `.Content`.\n3. **Fix the condition** — Add or correct a branch: if the return type is `BinaryData`, use `result.Content`; otherwise use `TypeName.FromResponse(result)`.\n4. **Regenerate and validate** — After fixing, re-run `Generate.ps1` and verify no CS0117 errors on SecurityInsights or similar services.\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e✅ Suggested Sub-Tasks\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n- [ ] Find the generator code path that emits `BinaryData.FromResponse(result)` in `/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/`\n- [ ] Add a type check: if return type is `BinaryData`, emit `result.Content` instead of `BinaryData.FromResponse(result)`\n- [ ] Write or update a generator test case for `BinaryData`-returning resource operations\n- [ ] Regenerate SecurityInsights and confirm CS0117 errors are resolved\n- [ ] Check other services in migration for the same pattern (potential broader impact)\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e🔗 Relevant Resources\u003c/summary\u003e\n\n- Parent migration issue: #56944\n- Generator source: [`/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt)\n- [`BinaryData` .NET API docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/api/system.binarydata) — confirms no `FromResponse` method exists\n- [Azure SDK .NET Generator README](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt#readme)\n\n\u003c/details\u003e","item_number":57055},"name":"add_comment"}}}
